title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what motivates people to do charity work and what impact their efforts might have on the community.

images.label: A
images.description: A group of volunteers sorting through donated food at a food bank, working efficiently in a large warehouse lined with shelves

images.label: B
images.description: Participants in a charity fun run wearing matching T-shirts, cheering and high-fiving spectators along a busy city street

followUp.question: Which of these fundraising or volunteering activities do you think is most effective, and why?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what role non-profit organisations play in society and what challenges they might face.

images.label: D
images.description: Staff members of an international charity giving a press conference to announce a new humanitarian project, with journalists taking notes

images.label: E
images.description: A small local charity office with a skeleton staff, volunteers answering phones and stuffing envelopes in a modest, cluttered room

followUp.question: Do you think large international charities or small local organisations do more good? What are the arguments for each?
